diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Acute on chronic systolic and diastolic heart failure
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with acute hypoxemic respiratory distress and suffered a PEA arrest, leading to a cardiac evaluation. Initial echocardiography showed a severely reduced ejection fraction and diagnostic catheterization indicated significant mitral regurgitation and coronary artery disease. Follow-up examinations confirmed these findings, supporting the final diagnosis of acute on chronic heart failure.
